passes.name: legacy duplicate product and control clients are absent
seven adaptive spaces are owned by the canonical contract
module registry derives from canonical contract
Today is the Owner default and My Work is the non-Owner default
disabled or unauthorized modules are removed from navigation
startup uses one browser-to-server RPC
startup defers secondary modules and schema scans
startup exposes timing and payload evidence
startup has no legacy three-call bootstrap sequence
first paint starts immediately with shared loading state
boot removes artificial startup delay
Today exposes decisions work money errors and recent activity
shared shell prevents blank workspaces
shared application provides safe retry and error states
production and reusable configs support field roles
role dashboards include core operating roles
field profiles enforce role-specific module access
field UI preserves Owner-controlled boundaries
module manager exposes dependencies roles records and status
module disable preserves records and history
module dependencies hold or cascade explicitly
essential modules cannot be disabled
approval center supports selected-record approve revise hold reject
approval decisions remain Owner-only and external-locked
customer workspace has connected records
job workspace has execution proof and financial records
Business Office list workspace and save are permission-aware
hard external-action boundaries remain locked
